app.name: FranchiseHub
app.tagline: Franchise control tower for Philippine franchisors.
app.shortDescription: Branches, sales reports, royalties, compliance, documents, and support — in one place.

phase0.label: Phase 0 — Foundation
phase0.description: Scaffold live. App, auth, and dashboards arrive in Phase 1–2 per PLAN.md.

auth.signInSubtitle: Use the email and password your head office set up for you.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Set up your access. A head office admin will assign your role afterwards.
auth.passwordHint: At least 12 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol.
auth.checkEmail: Account created. Please check your email to confirm your address, then sign in.

dashboard.phase2Note: Branch directory, franchisee profiles, sales reports, and royalty review arrive in the next Phase 2 commits.
